title: Generate Action
description: Generate a new airfoil action vector (deformation parameters) using linear sampling from provided bounds.

n_sp.description: Bezier sampling resolution (unused for action generation, but kept for compatibility).

params.description: List of [[r_min, r_max], [a_min, a_max], [e_min, e_max]] BOUNDS per control point. MUST provide [min, max] ranges, NOT single values. All values in [-1.0, 1.0].

items.description: Each point has 3 bounds: [[r_min, r_max], [a_min, a_max], [e_min, e_max]]
